description: the fastest and most powerful android decompiler(native tool working without Java VM) for the APK, DEX, ODEX, OAT, JAR, AAR, and CLASS file. which supports malicious behavior detection, privacy leaking detection, vulnerability detection, path solving, packer identification, variable tracking, deobfuscation, python&java scripts, device memory extraction, data decryption, and encryption, etc
notes: 【主要功能】: Android反编译工具，支持APK、DEX、ODEX、OAT等文件分析
【适用场景】: Android逆向分析、恶意软件检测、漏洞分析
【技术特点】: 原生工具无需Java VM，支持恶意行为检测、隐私泄露检测、脱壳识别、反混淆等
